allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./blades_edge_roster.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Top-level keys:', keys\); if\(d.characters\) { const c = d.characters[0]; console.log\('First char:', JSON.stringify\(c, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total:', d.characters.length\); } else if\(Array.isArray\(d\)\) { console.log\('Array len:', d.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(d[0], null, 2\)\); }")
